promotionPageSubtitle: Official Kifpadel messages to share (social, WhatsApp, email).
promotionPanelSubtitle: Generic sign-up link — no player referral code.
promotionClubPanelSubtitle: Sign-up link that redirects to club creation — no fees, no commitment.
promotionClubHint: The message states that sign-up is free with no commitment, and includes links to the club charter and privacy policy. Acceptance is required when creating a club.
promotionHint: Players also have a personal referral link in Profile. Referral rewards will be enabled in a future release.
